case_title: VON UHL, KARL VS DILLOW, STEVE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VON UHL, KARL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DILLOW, STEVE $280.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $295.00, DEFT TO RETURN TOOLS IN HIS POSSESSION PER AGREE- MENT OF PARTIES IN OPEN CT ON OR BEFORE 12/3/93. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JAN-03-1994, GRANTED
